notes: Arma 3 stock plastic armor material. Engine coeff ~0.3x vs Default. Used for non-structural body panels and light vehicle components. Represents the game's abstract 'plastic' armor class.

source.reference: ARMA 3 game engine configuration, BI config reference
source.methodology: RHAe=0.3 is the ARMA 3 game engine value for its 'plastic' armor class. Density set to approximate reinforced plastic material.
